title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: NEIGHBOR 2 NEIGHBOR PENDLETON WARMING STATION DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepting donations of sleeping bags, gloves, backpacks, and thermal underwear. 715 SE Court Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Open 7 days per week 6:30pm-8pm, Friday, November 15, 2024-Saturday, March 15, 2025 when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below Email (765) 791-8332 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (765) 791-8332 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for list of currently needed and accepted items FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
